files_modified: ~174 source files on feature/source-headers-dogfood (header block rewrites)

risks.title: Header stripping misses files
risks.mitigation: Verify file count before and after strip matches 174

risks.title: populate-coderef --source-headers skips files with preserveExisting=true
risks.mitigation: Strip all @semantic blocks first so no existing headers remain; populate then writes fresh @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 blocks

risks.title: rag-index chunks = 0 after rebuild
risks.mitigation: Prior run achieved 125 chunks attempted embedding; same pipeline should succeed. Verify count > 0 as acceptance gate.

risks.title: Embedding failure (no OpenAI key)
risks.mitigation: Pre-existing environment limitation acknowledged in WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-001 result. Chunks attempted embedding > 0 is the passing bar; actual embedding success is not required.

candidates: feature/source-headers-dogfood branch source files (174 .ts/.js files with @semantic blocks)

decision_records.decision: Create new WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-002 rather than reopening archived WO-001
decision_records.rationale: WO-001 is archived/closed; TRACKING integrity requires new WO for new execution pass
populate-coderef --source-headers with preserveExisting=true would skip already-stamped files; stripping first forces a clean re-stamp with the fixed @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 format
